ddls:
CREATE TABLE "drugs" (
  "drug_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drug */,
  "drug_name" TEXT /* Name of the drug */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the drug based on efficacy metrics */,
  "main_target" TEXT /* Main biological target of the drug */,
  "mechanism_of_action" TEXT /* Mechanism of action of the drug */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the drug */,
  "chemical_structure" TEXT /* Chemical structure of the drug */,
  "pubchem_id" TEXT /* PubChem ID for the drug */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the drug (e.g., approved, experimental) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drug_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drugs_mechanism_of_action FOREIGN KEY ("mechanism_of_action") REFERENCES mechanisms ("mechanism_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "drug_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "drug_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the drug associated with the metrics */,
  "average_cell_count" REAL /* Average cell count observed during the study */,
  "average_p53_intensity" REAL /* Average P53 intensity measurement */,
  "mahalanobis_dist" REAL /* Mahalanobis distance for outlier analysis */,
  "study_date" TEXT /* Date when the study was conducted */,
  "study_type" TEXT /* Type of study (e.g., in vitro, in vivo) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drug_metrics_drug_id FOREIGN KEY ("drug_id") REFERENCES drugs ("drug_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mechanisms" (
  "mechanism_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mechanism */,
  "mechanism_name" TEXT /* Name of the mechanism of action */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mechanism */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the mechanism (e.g., DNA damage, protein inhibition) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mechanism_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target */,
  "target_name" TEXT /* Name of the biological target */,
  "target_description" TEXT /* Description of the target */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of target (e.g., protein, DNA, RNA) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "drug_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the drug tested in the experiment */,
  "experiment_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "result_summary" TEXT /* Summary of results observed during the experiment */,
  "experimental_design" TEXT /* Design of the experiment (e.g., randomized controlled trial) */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Number of samples used in the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_drug_id FOREIGN KEY ("drug_id") REFERENCES drugs ("drug_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., lead researcher, lab technician) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution where the researcher is affiliated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the data */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_downloaded" INTEGER /* Whether data was downloaded or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the publication was published */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding" (
  "funding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding source */,
  "funding_agency" TEXT /* Name of the funding agency */,
  "grant_number" TEXT /* Grant number */,
  "funding_amount" REAL /* Amount of funding received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funding_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researcher_publications" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id", "publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_funding" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "funding_id" INTEGER /* ID of the funding source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "funding_id")
)
